name: emexDE
subtitle: Unfolding the power of stock iOS coding.
description:
This is the TrollApps source for emexDE.
emexDE is a iOS app that lets you build and deploy iOS apps directly on-device without owning any computer. Means you can program where ever and when ever and in any type of situation. It currently supports iOS 16.0 upto the latest iOS version. Its designed for people that often find them selves on the go and dont want to take their mac with them selves and for the people who want to get into iOS software development but dont own a mac. Previously such a app didnt exist because no one tried to build something like that, propably because people thought that its not possible.

apps.name: emexDE
apps.subtitle: IDE to develop native code iOS apps on unjailbroken iOS it self just via a certificate and a kernel virtualization layer for those apps.
apps.localizedDescription: emexDE is an iOS app that empowers developers with a full toolchain they can use while even being offline for iOS development on iPhone. It supports Swift, C, Objective-C, C++ and Objective-C++. It’s a powerful Xcode alternative that made the impossible possible, a fully on-device iOS IDE that doesn’t even need a cloud and can even be used with airplane mode enabled. It supports officially iOS 16 all the way up to the latest iOS version(iOS/iPadOS 26.5 tested). You can compile and run iOS apps on the go with ease, using the entire iOS 26.4 SDK.

versions.localizedDescription:
# Changelog
## Nyxian
- Theming patches (1cc4c63d09a0648a5356c90d0e22837f14d9b186)
- fixed objc utility generation (bff7e4d0a1f60ac97cd981aaf9ee03c2869afa8a)
- fixed window handling on iPhone (ded2d5c29b4d3dc0b34ca57f44e0b6e5b4674bfb)
- rethought application install (c87a607ed2c747fae3cc57cea5c95ad480f256c3, dc5cb0379ea08b2801c7ffaf0df15e0d3da42070, 1ee59d120148cc4eb4be1e4d7c97cc422ea2e6d3, c205dc236d1209a951cd187b0ee2f52cffdd2856, be12d71c08d40d6d1fbbf12d8a5453c6140938cf, b2297470239ebd6a90e36662bd38438dafde6cf4, f35d83be62ec4ba0eb081039726ad25775e6bac3, 7d047003d4875a77505601c5f988d92eb0e51f0d, 2aeb1381ba015c8f0cf9c52dd81f5a14bef28d4e, 7ee7cbefc5b97655189b38677f3a42daa4d8e292, 6cda7de5eb4b323249d739c05b3403cb71d0a0e8, f73b0bdad3c7324190b35fc8383494f4ece28f86)
- fixed write access in SDK paths in file manager (ad2450e01ff615a00bb341c96218fe90c968bba5)
- fixed issue navigator on iPhone (e75c170772104547525a25b10ad2f786256d6f93)
- patched DOS in zip extraction (695e37ed3cd5e47cf3554396e0dabee80a0e5eb5)
- corrected some appearance issues with GUI project configurator (a3b22fa8e7b28e0ac20ea5609bdfe266968b0373, fb619f5f5c536ec95325b4e8f147831a0c530786, 6e6471aeb5014d877b55035904feea8c2728563a, c57ef22fa53a15b2a4bd002f8c7c14b19e1b97fd)
- improved dependency scan performance (d5f9fe71353ca41ae7cc97bf87a8ae3e0c42a3f7)
- fixed window double close bug on iPadOS (344524e99222d4df83c23cf796b4cdb55c0215cd)
## Kernel Virtualization Layer (ksurface)
- Improved entitlement patching to Applications menu (8cb891dd3395b5dde279e102135d86b19d75e976, 8e16df8a179ef1ef5e173f290b5604ae2214f22c, e4efbcf7c1d24e42b18d4971a3fe3425f127614d)
- PEObject patches (a20eae5da97b97b1a6150909833f94b30dfc2842)
- Radix tree patches (ddfce454e9674b79f70e9c6bd679e143fb31aa1f)
- Vulnerability fix: unexpected system termination due to null ptr deref (d9d2c9321b8be6bde482f78f1abb67d383ee7c93)
- Vulnerability fix: improper cleanup path in tty initialization leading to a use-after-free (6ce364889adb53ccba19236fe782acefc023f379)
- Vulnerability fix: improper action order in tty deinitilization leading to a race condition (8ae5e4d513129a3f6cfdfe12c87df8022b07fa3f)
- Resource leak fix: resource exhaustion due to improper cleanup (c5b100443d4683d83c5efaa7d87a7c66678c68ec)
- Improvement: added PEEntitlementPlatformRoot (926a259e9dc48d94473e007c4adb09c7e47a0199, 1d536641508a652c58e746c4b8fb1711e4b8fbbd, 3226ee6b16e44800d749b0e5d713fd1f731e1cde)
- Improvement: better trust and entitlement code (9c1cf66a03691939d8b3099f363585ef2106d833, 766434a22dc0141178c17c3634224cd23dde876a, b5fe7975a2eaf3b699a7eaef979bef0c91a0fea9)
- Security hardening: nerfing capability of root user process to automatically be able to enumerate processes (ad4a9e63dd96e00dbaa1853e255465b70aeeeeeb)
- Bug fix: use correct path for the CFPrefsPlistSource hook (990bc47a3c33867c83f5f025280837b3c9af39c5)
## nxtool (resign trollstore apps on macOS to nyxian apps, basically embed nyxian entitlements into ipa's)
- initial release

# Changelog

## Nyxian
- Improved logic in Issue Navigator (d3e852224f53d260b5c53bee67cccab380aa92c3)
- Added GUI project configuration (d1fe1f29512dcf1c58c130ad54c190948456d198, a7e9da21a2b12a8ab468adaaddf14a1d74ee6586, d98b16b600a4e708a5e38d0f471dd8a0880079ba, c784014c7f79570d9663a9bdb6358f904fff05c0, c120fb8b694b1debb2b2a0879be087a0d8a9c1e3)
- Updated SDK to iPhoneOS26.4 (751e2f12ba4b1bc235662ceb934deb45dc28c5a1)
- Bug fix: fixed barbutton items not theming on iOS 26 (47eb2a8ee3b9513f4ae726fb702e5cf261522bac, e026fc3b4ce4b1d3584ff5dc5825b66e6c78e979)
- Bug fix: touch inputs not getting delivered to NXTerminalWindowSession properly (62aa2f6aa8cf8c5ce9d4b7c4d03f300f5bb99e12)
- Bug fix: window focus refix (4f4cc1a044a5c42f0eb8f05aac5009e3f0ea834f)
- WindowServer v4 introduction
- Added "Jump to definition" in code editor (026ec8d4bf2ad757fa9650f324e263a52dbd0460, 5500bc96be11d51423b67ab70bbda0c333b16abe, 5384079c952def2ff448ecad64c3040b3f929bab, b98f2f2c8565ff94b65b851b02b466a3fb411750)
- Using LLVM's dependency scanner for better accuracy for incremental builds (fdb4d5ae723979ddf2c0f97cdf699e709826821a)
- Other minor optimizations

## Ksurface
- Syscall server improvements (better performance) (4d5d37f89d5010362a5515c25e31a6ea23e39af5, 3a55079f747355f5d6b62d83701c5c1cdb05aef1, 2ba098c48165027b264bd3f4fbf1ad299ec5a86e)
- Fixed vulnerability: critical type size mismatch of `PEEntitlement` (7d7ae3e2fbab1a48812e445e6158fe70588be59b)
- Fixed vulnerability: null pointer dereference in `SYS_handoffep` (72220c4386d798c72aac3efba364bced521ebae3)
- Fixed vulnerability: missing break label in `SYS_ioctl` (d1a0e2c1f5be78f8b1bda79aae178f1f41c24fd3)
- Fixed vulnerability: semantical mismatch of syscalls `sys_task_` (58f51c54185a1d43026ea4a7e6ce3dc227501156)
- Fixed vulnerability: memory corruption in `proc_copy_for_proc(2)` (95fbe1458d4bc7f49eab918f3467e66d80eff6fa) (already replaced API with kvobject(stands for kernel virtualized object))
- Fixed vulnerability: dangling mach port reference created by `SYS_gettask` (6432e95ad3484d42364c2bbbfabc6fa9c709bb2f, c0b69f10fa2295460477858fcd05e69661ce95c6)
- Fixed vulnerability: DOS in `SYS_gettask` (d6ab6093252e745251ca3c48bc50fa3308b83420)
- Fixed vulnerability: object leak on `ENOSYS` path in syscall server (259a39f697c8bf64c5afaf84754bf808e88c979c)
- Fixed vulnerability: null pointer deref may happen in proc list api (4dc1e69efda8e743a4f0475aa365e04b93207f8d)
- Fixed vulnerability: flavour confusion in proc list api (25cec7c942e57c952e334ee1e84685608f61ea10)
- Fixed vulnerability: race condition in `SYS_procpath` (af259e22ff260a3bcb1e0ce97ba3563c1bc2adc1)
- Fixed vulnerability: privilege escalation in `SYS_gettask` (2dfc66e07228b93b59e9bf854afd3273d3b092b8)
- Fixed vulnerability: race condition in proc copy api (33cc1b50b112dbecbc571685523275cc139a47e8) (already replaced API with kvobject(stands for kernel virtualized object))
- Fixed vulnerability: missing unlock path of proc table in proc api  (7e349d52242dd996403db9895c8e3afc4fa370da)
- Fixed vulnerability: use-after-free in proc lookup api (cffd6a36606faf39741cffdcebbddbdab6e062c9)
- Fixed vulnerability: privilege escalation in `proc_permitive_over_pid(5)` (f373680e5541c922cdea750bf9cfe87aa69682e6, c392b2aaaf273308d542decbb7e8ef11d1644260)
- Fixed resource leak: file descriptor leak in `SYS_signexec` (d1a0e2c1f5be78f8b1bda79aae178f1f41c24fd3)
- Fixed resource leak: mach ports leak in syscall server (21e762c713b1f2fd2286f5c86ee59d553e78cbd3)
- Fixed resource leak: entire mach messages of syscall server (67871da11f6966c2831980b18cc2ff0bceac9ddd, 7ae16ad54eb2e000d76f3ee479ae65ef9889dc9b)
- Bug fix: fixing the iOS 26.4+ crash (4b21e76e6b6460ac7ac01db56f8282a188ea5a9c, 565ed891c08fff3324fddc2ac8f957e7c769861d)
- Bug fix: utility home paths incorrectly being set (407ace19468d0981f264e459b10c6a7fe7565381)
- Feature: `SYS_wait4` fix (9a0b0a48647dd73db450f47bc8c4a98c455294fc, ffb91baa43a11d3284ab87cabe8dca21bcb9ccd8, e966e0643f74560e8c61066d508745e9e32d915b, 8fae3f1937f6caeec160edca05ee81ff4b7c473b)
- Feature: better panic system (for debug only) (b80dfc802e40f17761ad9dc4c2175b90fa71ef7f)
- Feature: tty support(no forkpty yet) (edb70eddeb66cb4bed3213936e2f80b5e8d26540, 8d4466e33dc0acafdfd805808665d61d89a27e7e, 07eba8ce0e4bd75bbad892967d31f35986dbb03a, de3c5cffa465fedb0b4995fe386ae6c9bb76cc5f, 8d89c99aa2633334a3d87a904c35e6ed762daf14, 5ed7894507e49864640869624c0a288bd67027be, 6c83b819724c2402b41e03c1365581b5d97c536e, 1081cd553dcc7d405523f5fd201a7062ed84be26, 3af601a48b7a43d31ffde2ebd4bed335f59c7a2e, 706796ad80cd37c34996aa257b323b1bc02f47ef, 58fe7dff90d5d23adb584bb1f1e1b786822993bd, fa052ef4faad3c1c66e9335421bfe8c8a5bef528, 1cf242bfba54facc337c2bb976088da1fe47d710, 1cf242bfba54facc337c2bb976088da1fe47d710, 69596047a98c86acff772c8732112e185712027c)
- Feature: `SYS_setent` syscalls to drop entitlements (b7d96f8b43a5890440593afee153b1d493ad1cd0, a514fb80b7445504b78689a9bac97cbfc72c7402)
- Feature: new cryptographic code signing (507e8289c28619d8898e9334c7ebc57b01a1b291)
- Feature: process zombification (19e831cd33c4073388da966667984477c99d98d8)
- Improvement: better ksurface init (b8d76deeb9b52a87656b18d120b25b9168cba581)
- Improvement: validating entitlements now on host side and replaced `ksurfaced` with `containerd` (3cee76677bc93af3b7cff610da455f5fc7fbd9e8)
- Improvement: Daemon crashes wont cause deadlocks anymore (f69d208b3e802190bf15363ff17036619d79b6a7, d4abbf188730e45a3c164baa8adc83059d310b88)
- Improvement: Added brand new kernel object api aka kvobject (29addf50afbc02f12a028b6b70abf0a97bf91e33, 5cddfe11f3cec4bbe97ed5386ffc4cd8bc65686a, b75064442e3500b1b276ba35b5400ba5b7fde1cd, 0cd2d5665fcefc6c23de0c5a82ad84745638ab22, d70151a797cc7f952647eb951929312669f5841a, f458091330dce364eb2e0ba428dc87e5e4c91d91, 4ee265dcdaa1ce6772a4380ede1e4476c8efa8cd, ca735b8bc854ba5eab1dd140404889b225bb233c, 09b45f23484a85b0ae2a47d08a81714773fe8860, eeef5fe85ac70f201a85ce7b54bef0fb2a505913, 632fc87b7e8e7a48d0e37ce46a78262dfcd189fd, 673ce9e658e968baa820e51f48aa8e3276d8a504, 47c3ae019a417eb48c92a04dacc8d73176f487b6, 21b98d9d1615b1d5334475e21e6f828b80582931, ebbaac70ba5cd586b232a16dc43d356a12241bcf, e309858cf5094f5e909dfc5fd8348f8b358e16c1, 94c907a7cdad6a30c6f2fd7cf7abdee99668cd2d, ecf0c29d09eb63bca4b2f726efaea6f2ac26f13f, 5054f9888584b28759a8b8b5decf2ba891b71d1c, b5f5c148231d969b2bcd488e8e503d76a8161f2d, c3a6a76ecc9a26c9c1bdb7ce7d3d8404d28e8100, cf0859809c77bcb49708d4fa365916ccdcb9b380)
- Improvement: Now tfp works on all iOS versions (b6c9ee65bb63784a0d057332a44c39198f2f1a75, 4e9f0d1e2be5073964615a1988d76b1912149619, aa54ed96a164706971805c8715bfc80e7bfbe226, d9224e3b97e502afec8aa6894ae3d6c7231d7c25, fcfbc61b860066000fdc817bcbfe3fc75913dce7, 7f3d93a3c9206bd3e34cdb5acf0ef08b0e9d53d8, 4f4affe601dc15d665aae16fa3fd147b6b6ebc76, ffeb5da2353c372613953be1017f07bed320355f, c44c08780b1569f0e69fffe2db982b1a89113a59, 5c7487480adcd22158de208d097a76e38aae3767, c0bede51d52491f146236e5af68c76972bda619a, f9891521bb25964de2a7680d51c4fc326cc1268d, b1b47fa26d3f968ea6d1d68014e44ad16cc72ed1, 7062e710fcd390a18223f14f72fb9c54267807dc, 4ebf18b16e5dac285479f13ef2116ea4c33f6761, a5398d592b657d52ade3bbc408370f0e1a718b98)
- Improvement: stripped and improved inefficient LC source code (25632e9f33f82594882517e65430da26e4977686, 261782ba098dedeb5ad1753e62f8c933292501f2, 3987fb84c85f992aa42fc2374d7f3eb48dd8b521, 5eb783521fc10b65fd4cdbcd4c3af7eefb9279c0, d0af2c3c8cd122dcc65048930437fd7e602b323e, d0af2c3c8cd122dcc65048930437fd7e602b323e, 6c1b83c89f6229a5d628d183540017ad390f8117, 2822f87089830ff7dea878e1df5c659381596e41, ce1933e040384c4690ef68c6cb89996fffab7011, 97be455a449f9becf1d0ffd194fa8b411375a724, c3a2d78b1b48df5bb0f798bc79bbba065b0af85e)
- Improvement: now the user is warned that the NSExtension is missing if it is missing (10aae935d6274d90d287899710af43b2d4d72c2c)
- Improvement: added task name support to `SYS_gettask` (11190aff3968748d915a84ee72055bc33400fc8c)
- Improvement: removed restrictions from `DYLD_INSERT_LIBRARIES` (3a323048a3f88950ec378a346eb6d81517f59997)
- Improvement: introducing syscall server v3 with userspace ptr support (dbf7248d15aab45666e3be1eb7a2e0834dce11bd)
- Improvement: introducing 64bit radix trees (2d783776b71f8056c2a7c19d3c81242232102e63)
- Improvement: replaced the fork() fix with the new vfork() fix (96cbd0fff84c32c583b11b0e2531fdf58ab41945)
- Improvement: better process flag state management (ac4c8a085eb73067e4950795fb37ba59c50aca5c, 8fd6bef4512404fb3dd076e6351724601d1f06e8)
- Improvement: replaced 2000 branches with memcpy for CFBundle override (aaf5c5087b485fb6876513e9ac5a03de2772f9f3, 83d93565a155511a58f770038896597136e94b88, 714b57f4f7ba11e7d3d9f086e4106598e6271c65, b08963cb3e314fc7fe6640b4a2c14aeee4d60c52)
- Improvement: now exit sets the exit of the process in ksurface (edeb2074817954aa61516f4ff4c66e227b81c2e6, be53319cca097b053f1e86e0219f30dd0eadd433)
- Improvement: correctly overriding NSProcessInfo (a114284f4233c757f78a18dcbaac3818ddea203f, 8d9d5912c6a83463f11f187c38118c000a62b398, 8d9d5912c6a83463f11f187c38118c000a62b398)
- Improvement: hookless posix spawn file actions fix (86cf3070fa5d3f35db98165fb0b26a4e96814511, 278465bd18beba30bf61730d55e24d32bacd6466, f9af413bb67c7df58e94cbb0b9b78d75ca367404)
- Improvement: forkbomb halfway fixed? (3a9eadd8cb64cc60b92c1fbeb4b7ae8b8160adcd)
- Improvement: fixed crash of process when they append a file descriptor to `FDMapObject` (328a45b29da04cba31a9508ac8fcb31f7056c0ff, c0eca4b0c89e001a72fc567c899f7b75994332b3, 670753d433e2aa3c5b6ce4d4d7fdd8845a7a4726)
- Improvement: return with errno in posix spawn api (814d45ca156dee491de87fd62334cb51c8948fb6)
- Security hardening: stripping entitlements regardless of platformization (58d5acbae0c2bd32777bd18f25d06bbf3a79a3b1)
- Security hardening: removed potential DDOS vector and validated task port flavor in `proc_task_for_proc(3)` (bf475d490784804e536e396107dfa2ab43db5caa)
- Security hardening: switch to immovable receive right in syscall server (91d50f85a57846ab9cdb0c5238bd7da15b11db29)
- Security herdening: limited amount of kvobject events to make sure no attacker can exhaust resources that way (2791120f989a2829d7c682c9b5ffa6b7d3b0e0f6)
- Security hardening: added ipc object validation (b7bd5ed23301150d05dd3d9b0354d9d4455c6c7e)
- Security hardening: added bundle validation in installd (fdf11f25b8382a4d41ff8c5a173396064db4511b)
- Security hardening: made signing and running unsigned binaries slightly less likely to iOS kernel panic iPads that have the sloppy IONVME kext (353b84bcbff58cd8ed36cbec43496b308e2972ed, e7b2f78d13ba67e3084cfd042d17f2e53de35fd2)

## Nyxian For Jailbreak
- Bug fix: slow installation after first install (bc864bf820a883067e6a1613b3d5f8762acbebf8)
- Bug fix: entitlements not applying (bc864bf820a883067e6a1613b3d5f8762acbebf8)
- Bug fix: deadlock while install
- Improvement: added LLVM from stock Nyxian to jailbroken so kids stop crying at me because their package manage installed the wrong version of clang, lld, etc (25793ec6342da6d4dba7c409ba8a43e6334f5c40)

## Nyxian For TrollStore
- Initial release

> [!NOTE]
> Virtual entitlement GUI-based management will be fixed in 0.9.1.
> But entitlements of project builds shall not be affected by that problem!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ProjectNyxian/Nyxian/compare/0.8.6...0.9
